movie.synopsis: A serial killer in Hyderabad recreates famous paintings using human victims, sparking a high-stakes pursuit by a determined detective and an ambitious journalist. As the killer’s psychological games blur the lines between reality and art, they must uncover a dark connection to a local college before the next “exhibit” is revealed.
